prose:
The calculated frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO gap) of furan is 6.2574 eV. This result was obtained using density functional theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1 on a fixed geometry supplied in the .xyz file. The geometry was not optimized at the DFT level.

SCF convergence was achieved in 9 cycles. The HOMO energy is -6.3598 eV, and the LUMO energy is -0.1024 eV. There were no warnings reported, and the calculation was verified to be trustworthy. The live calculations were logged to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpn90k8y9o/live.json`.
